hero.freezeTitle: A freeze saves your streak when you miss one day
hero.streakAtRisk: Your streak is on ice — train today to save it (uses a freeze).
hero.streakKeepAlive: Keep the flame alive — any activity counts.
hero.streakStart: Do anything today — a puzzle, a lesson, a game — to light your streak.

daily.title: Daily puzzle
daily.body: One hand-picked puzzle — same for everyone, new every day.

openings.dueBody: Spaced repetition says it’s time — drill them before they fade.
openings.caughtUpBody: Nothing due right now. Learn a new line to grow your repertoire.
openings.startBody: Pick openings for White and Black, drill them move by move.

lessons.allDoneBody: Replay any lesson to sharpen up — replays still earn XP.

playCard.title: Play a game
playCard.body: Face a bot at your level — wins count toward quests.

goal.title: Daily goal

goal.freezesTitle_other: {{count}} streak freezes banked — a freeze saves your streak when you miss one day
goal.atRisk: Train today to save your streak (uses a freeze)

quests.title: Daily quests
quests.allDone: 🏅 All quests complete — +{{xp}} XP bonus earned. New quests tomorrow!
quests.finishAll: Finish all {{total}} for a +{{xp}} XP bonus. Fresh quests every day.

weekly.title: Your week in chess
weekly.aiDisclosure: AI-generated from your verified weekly stats
weekly.byokHint: Add your own AI key in Settings to unlock a personalised AI recap — this summary works without one.
